title: Clinical and Molecular Features in Medulloblastomas Subtypes in Children in a Cohort in Taiwan.
author: Wu KS Sung SY Huang MH Lin YL Chang CC Fang CL Wong TT Chen HH Tsai ML
content: S-EPMC9657873 PMC9657873 Clinical and Molecular Features in Medulloblastomas Subtypes in Children in a Cohort in Taiwan. Medulloblastoma (MB) was classified into four molecular subgroups: WNT, SHH, group 3, and group 4. In 2017, 12 subtypes within 4 subgroups and 8 subtypes within non-WNT/non-SHH
